title: DAO first sequence number: C=0 vs Python/Rust=1 (wire-visible, interacts with replay caches)
description: C lichen_rpl_dao_manager_build_dao (routing.c:310-313): use-then-increment -> first DAO dao_sequence=0 (comment explicitly intends this). Python dao.py:111 and Rust routing.rs:304: increment-then-use -> first DAO dao_sequence=1. Wire-visible on the first DAO; interacts with sequence-based replay caches (Rust root's lollipop DAOSequence check rejects a replayed seq-1 DAO from Python/Rust; a C node's seq-0 DAO sits outside that window convention). RFC 6550 doesn't fix a starting value - pick one for LICHEN and align all three.
